name: Digital Markets Act
description: EU Digital Markets Act (Regulation (EU) 2022/1925) — designates gatekeeper platforms and imposes obligations to ensure contestable and fair digital markets. Targets large core platform services (search engines, social networks, messaging, video, advertising, marketplaces, browsers, OS, cloud computing).
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud computing services explicitly named as a Core Platform Service category.
relationToAISecurity: Indirectly affects AI services where they constitute core platform services for gatekeepers.

license.notes: EU legislation published in OJEU. Reuse permitted under EUR-Lex terms; attribution expected.

current_extraction.tool: Playwright (HTML retrieval, EUR-Lex WAF bypass) + extract_eu_regulation.py (ELI parser)
current_extraction.notes: HTML fetched via Playwright (EUR-Lex WAF blocks automated curl) then parsed with the generic regulation/europa.eu/extract_eu_regulation.py using ELI class markup. CELEX 32022R1925. Output: DMA-articles.{csv,json} (54 articles), DMA-recitals.{csv,json} (109 recitals), DMA-annexes.{csv,json} (1 annexes).

extraction_history.reason: Initial structured extraction; HTML fetched via Playwright (EUR-Lex WAF) and parsed via shared ELI extractor

notes: Metadata stub; acquire source and extract.
